Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To May-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Derek Knudsen for and with Michael Miller (Trustee).

Mr. Knudsen explained why the fourth account did not get filed and stated that he will get it on file within the next day or two. Status on filing of the fourth account was continued to May 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Derek Knudsen and the Trustee Michael Miller to appear on March 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Fourth Account has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Accounting

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Derek Knudsen appearing for Michael Miller.
The court informs Mr Knudsen that attorneys fees should have been requested in advance with a time breakdown and payment authorized by court order. The petition is approved with the atorneys fees of $1,500.00 deferred until the next accounting which covers January 2007 through December 2007. The next accounting is to be filed 2 weeks before May 30, 2008. Modified order signed in open court.
